landing.topSubtitle: Real Opportunity Scores from live market data — updated continuously.
landing.heroTitle: Buy low. Earn dividends. Sell high — automatically.
landing.heroSubtitle: Dipzee turns four numbers into one clear Opportunity Score so you know what to buy, hold or sell in seconds.
landing.emailPrivacy: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
landing.howStep1Desc: Type any ticker or company name from the TSX or US markets.
landing.howStep2Desc: A transparent 0–100 score combines price position, upside and dividend.
landing.howStep3Desc: Build watchlists and get notified when a stock enters the buy zone.
landing.scoreExplainerDesc: The Opportunity Score blends how close the price is to its 52-week low (45%), the upside to analyst targets (35%) and the dividend yield (20%).
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to invest with clarity
landing.feature1Desc: A transparent 0–100 signal with Buy / Hold / Sell.
landing.feature2Desc: Buy zone, target reached, price and score thresholds.
landing.feature3Desc: Track your stocks, sorted by opportunity.
landing.feature4Desc: Spot income stocks yielding 4% or more.
landing.faq1Q: How is the Dipzee Opportunity Score calculated?
landing.faq1A: Our algorithm cross-references dozens of real-time indicators, including current price versus 52-week high/low, dividend yield, and global analyst projections. It condenses everything into a single Score from 0 to 100 so you know exactly the stock's strength.
landing.faq2Q: Where do the real-time quotes and data come from?
landing.faq2A: We use a pool of premium oracles connected directly to the markets. Dipzee relies on multiple institutional providers and bank-grade redundancy (fallback) mechanisms to guarantee precision and speed.
landing.faq3Q: How do the instant alerts work?
landing.faq3A: You set the conditions (e.g. if the stock drops below a price or hits our Score Buy Zone) and our engines operate 24/7. When the condition is met, we notify you instantly within the platform and via E-mail.
landing.faq4Q: Can I use Dipzee to invest in foreign markets?
landing.faq4A: Absolutely! You have access to robust global data and the system features smart currency adaptation, allowing you to view metrics in Reais (BRL), US Dollars (USD), or Canadian Dollars (CAD).
landing.faq5Q: What is included in the 7-day free trial?
landing.faq5A: Full Premium Access! You unlock the entire platform, allowing you to evaluate the Score of any global asset, use the Screener, and set up unlimited Alerts to validate the accuracy of our insights.
landing.faq6A: No. We do not hold your money and we are not a brokerage. Dipzee is a SaaS (Software as a Service) analytics platform focused on tracking and discovering opportunities for you to trade at your preferred broker.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start with 7 days free and see live opportunities. Cancel anytime.
landing.disclaimer: Dipzee provides educational information and automated signals, not personalized financial advice. Not a registered investment adviser. Do your own research.
landing.microTrial: 7 days free • Card required • Cancel anytime
landing.proof3: Clear signals: Buy / Hold / Reduce / Sell
landing.secSubtitle: We follow market-standard practices to keep your information safe.
landing.sec1: Encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest

asset.notFound: No data available for this ticker.
asset.btWhatDesc: A backtest simulates how a strategy would have performed in the past using real historical prices. It helps you understand the potential risk and return of a buy/sell rule BEFORE risking real money. Past results don't guarantee future performance.
asset.btTipTrades: Number of trades (buy + sell) the strategy executed in the period.
asset.btTipWin: Share of trades that ended in profit.
asset.btTipStrategy: Total compounded return following the strategy.
asset.btTipBuyHold: Return of simply buying at the start and holding to the end (benchmark).
asset.btTipDrawdown: Largest peak-to-trough drop — measures the strategy's worst-case risk.
asset.btTipTimeIn: Percentage of time the strategy was invested (otherwise in cash).
asset.aiError: Couldn't generate the analysis right now.
asset.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated content for educational purposes only. Not investment advice.
